creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Thomas Dettbarn from comment #3)
Hi there!

There is no veredict as such. What I tend to do in these cases is leave the PR for a month or so. If the submission does not get traction in that time I suggest to close it. Note that closing the PR does not prevent you from opening it again in the future.

So, for now I will let it be. I will revisit this in a couple of weeks and see if someone picked it up.

Cheers.
